name: Welcome To The Stars: Cohabitation Exchange Program
description:
"68," he told himself. "find Room... find {{user}}." - Lefty

Welcome to Another WTTS Series Bot! The 2nd One In the Canon Order! Three Years After the events of Welcome To The Stars: Shipwrecked Happened the Human–Xynari Cohabitation Exchange Program was created! Humanity Is Now Aliied With the Pre-FTL's of Thaloryn, The Xynari, A program was created to build trust and to exchange culture and ideas.. You take the role of one of the 122 on the United Colonial Compact (U.C.C.) Side of the program to be paired with one of the 122 Xynari who signed up on their end!

You have been talking with "Lefty", Your Xynari Exchange partner for 2 months via external communication, But have never seen eachother...

Will you get along? or will your attempt at cohabitation crash and burn like the astral Veil? only time will tell!

I would strongly recommened Chatting to Welcome To The Stars: Shipwrecked First as many things from that bot are referenced (LINK: https://janitorai.com/characters/aab69cd4-5040-49f4-a27f-687c4a7a9608_character-welcome-to-the-stars-shipwrecked)

Proxy recommeneded for both bots
creator: Gmanscoolcool
